titleStmt.title: SII 20.82: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 82. (B.K. No. 71 of 1938-39.) BEṬADŪR, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in front of Kalamēśvara temple.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated Śaka 1045, Subhakṛit, • • • • • Amāvāsye, Friday, solar eclipse, the name of the month being lost. The date is irregular. In the cyclic year Śubhakṛit which, however, corresponds to Śaka 1044, no solar eclipse occurred whereas in the previous year Plava, a solar eclipse occurred in the month of Phālguṇa when the weekday was Friday. The intended date may be, therefore, A.D. 1122, March 10, Friday.

The inscription which falls in the reign-period of Vikramāditya VI, registers a gift of land, garden and money to god Mūlasthāna of the agrahāra Kisuvare by several individuals whose names are specified. In the beginning it seems to refer to [Jaya]kēśidēva of the Kadaṁba family who, it is known, was a feudatory of Vikramāditya VI.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mahā
raṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamānaharadharaṇīprasūta
vaṁśamahōdayamahīdharēṁdrasikharābhyudaya pracaṇḍamārttaṇḍa
japratāpavaśīkritasakalamahīmaṁṇḍaḷika vānaramahādhvaja permmaṭṭi
rgghōṣaṇaṁ caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭhitāṣṭādaśāśvamēdhadīkṣādīkṣitakulaprasūtaṁ hi
śikharasthāpitamahātējaprabhāva tyāgajagajhaṁpa jhaṁpaḷācāryya nissaṁkarāma su
kaśōpaḷaṁ śaraṇāgatavajraprākāra maṇḍaḷikatrinētra nāmādi samastaprasasti sahita
kēsidēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salutta
magaṁ brahma grahāra kisuvareyalu Agastyagōtrada nārāyaṇabhaṭṭara
vita vara magaṁ vināyakadvēdiyaru mūlasthānadēvara pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi tamma vṛttiya mattaru vasugeya
keyyumabaḷeya keṟeya keḷagaṇa Ondu 1 kūvina tōṁṭamumaṁ pa[ḍedu . A]ṁgaḍi vane yi vaṇa sahita telli
Ā maneya teṟeyoḷage mūṟu paṇamu Intinituma mahājanaṁgaḷa kayyalu mānyavāgi paḍedu biṭṭaru
cikabbeya maga cavuṇḍaṁgaḷu tamma vṛttiya mattaru vasugeya Ondu 1 mattaru kayyaṁ mahājanaṁgaḷa kayyalu mānya
dēvaṁge biṭṭaru mahādēvaṣaṇaṁgiyaru brāhmaṇi kaṁcikabbege taṁma haḍuvaṇa madhyada maneya
biṭṭaru sēbyada balaṁva kuṁbāṟageṟeya Ēriya keḷage Ayvatu 50 kaṁbha gaddeyu Atharvvaṇa
naṁ poṟage Īśānyadale Ayvattu 50 kaṁbha gaddeyu manintu nūṟu 100 kaṁbha gardde yumaṁ mahā The letter yu is written below the line.
jeya koṭṭu Ā dēvarige mānyavāgi biṭṭanu śakavarṣa 1045 neya śubhakṛt saṁvatsa
bahuḷa Amāvāsye sukravāra tatupuṇyōdayadinadoḷu sūryyagrahaṇa tātkāladoḷa
kadvēdiyara mammaṁ Īśvarabhaṭṭaru mahādēvaṣaṇaṁgiyara Atharvvaṇa gōvindabhaṭṭara Aṇe
mēgaṇa Aremattaru gaddeya nīrvvarigaṁ krayavaṁ koṭṭu Ūriṁge pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu mānyavāgi
Ā dēvarige biṭṭaru Ā gaddege hiriya dēvadhara ghaisāsaru koṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 rāji seṭṭiya
ru koṭṭa gadyāṇa 3 bavasiga kalliseṭṭi koṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 sēnabōva baladēvaṁ koṭṭa gadyāṇa 1
mailaya naḷemayaṁ koṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 svasti vijñātānēkavēdavēdāṁgōpāgaṁ tatva jñānamā
rttaṇḍajvāḷāmaṁṇḍitapuṇḍarīkākṣa lakṣmīviśāḷavakṣasthaḷahaṁsayuvatīsa
rōjavirājamānarappa śrīmat sarvvanamaśya brahmapuri Agrahāraṁ kisuvare
ya mahājana Aṟuvattirvvaruṁ Ī dharmavaṁ tamma dharmmamāgi kiḍalīyade sarbbā bhyaṁtara
śuddhiyiṁ svadharmadiṁ mānyamāgi pratipālisuvaru I dharmmamaṁ svadiṁ pra tipāḷisidaProbably this stands forsvadharmmadiṁ.
vargge prayāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradali sāyira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ
ponnalu kaṭṭisi vēdapāragarappa sahasrabrāhmaṇargge sūryagrahaṇa tātkāla
dalu dānaṁgoṭṭa phalaṁ Ī dharmamanāvanōrvvanaḷidavaṁge prayāge vāraṇāsi kuru
kṣētradalu vēdapāragarappa sahaśrabrāhmaṇarumaṁ sāyirakavileyumaṁ sūryya
grahaṇa tātkāladalu konda pātaka . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kā
lē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānu bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁ
dra . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya
tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattāṁ vā paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasaha śrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © hoṟagaṇiṁ bandu Ūroḷage māṟida bhattada salage
mahājanaṁgaḷu mūlasthānadēvarige koṭṭaru mahādēvaṣaṇaṁgiyara brā
hmaṇi kaṁcikabbegaḷu takkara maggigara bhōjanakke hoṁge variṣakke Ippaṇa vṛddhiyalu
Ūra mēle koṭṭa gadyāṇa Ayidu Ī dharmmavaṁ mahājanaṁ pratipālisuvar
Digital edition of SII 20.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
